title: Amtech F1700 5 Piece masonry drill bit set
features: FOR LIGHTWEIGHT JOBS: This masonry drill bit set is suitable for light duty drilling in masonry and light density brick and block
VERSATILE: The bits can be used in most keyed and keyless drill chucks
SIZES: Supplied in plastic storage case, the set includes sizes 4mm, 5mm, 6mm, 8mm and 10mm
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
